app.name: Daily Outreach Report Generator
app.description: AI workflow to generate daily performance reports for social outreach campaigns.

data.title: Calculate Metrics
Generate Insights
Format Report
data.template:

| DMs Sent | {{dms_sent}} | - |
| Replies | {{replies_received}} | {{dm_response_rate}}% |
| Conversions | {{conversions}} | {{conversion_rate}}% |
